/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_robotiq_controller__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libmy_robotiq_controller__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/my_robotiq_controller__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/my_robotiq_controller/srv/detail/set_force__description.c.o CMakeFiles/my_robotiq_controller__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/my_robotiq_controller/srv/detail/set_force__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/my_robotiq_controller__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/my_robotiq_controller/srv/detail/set_force__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/my_robotiq_controller__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/my_robotiq_controller/srv/detail/set_speed__description.c.o CMakeFiles/my_robotiq_controller__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/my_robotiq_controller/srv/detail/set_speed__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/my_robotiq_controller__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/my_robotiq_controller/srv/detail/set_speed__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
